keys.subject: Your 14-day free trial has started — ${service}
keys.headline: Your free trial is live
keys.introHtml: Your 14-day Professional trial is now live. You have full access to all features{expirySuffix}.
keys.textBody:
Hi {name},

Your 14-day Professional trial is now live{expirySuffix}.

Choose a plan: {upgradeUrl}

The {serviceName} Team
